1111.content: Who ends up getting Superman, one of the strongest man on Earth in his Universe into a gay role reversal?
1111.title: Superman

choices: a young pre-teen fan wanting to meet him
an old lady being mugged (the mugger gains the upper hand)
11113.content:
Superman was doing his patrol of the planet in a time of peace with no threats to the planet having been seen in almost a couple of months now. In truth Superman was feeling rather board and was thinking of just calling it a night to go work on an article for Perry. When suddenly his superhearing picked up someone calling for him.

Thinking someone was calling for him he wasted no time in zooming to the call finding....
11113.title: bored on patrol

choices: looked like he was trying to stop Geoffrey from winning
111131.content:
Geoffrey Sparks was one of Superman's biggest fan, at least according to all his friends. Having every single article written about the hero, even ones printed back when the Strongest Man Alive first showed up to save the day, in several note books. So seeing the hero fly over his house he could not help but call out to the man, though he had not expected the Hero to respond to him

"Hello young man how may I be of service," Superman asked landing in a classic hero pose with his hands on his hips.

Oh My God Superman!" Geoffrey basically screamed as he bounced in place. "I have always wanted to meet you," he said making the hero smile down at him. "Can you sign something for me?"

"Why sure kiddo it seems to be a quite night tonight I have some time to kill," Superman said making the young ten year old boy give another scream as he rusher out of the room. Superman shook his head with a slight chuckle at the skinny blonde haired greened eye youth who was quickly back holding out one of his note books.

Superman was rather surprised as he looked at the bulging notebook which seemed to be filled with article all about him, even ones not written in the Daily Planet. Taking the offered pen the hero signed his name on the article dealing with his first appearance where Lois had given him his hero-name of Superman. The kid gave another happy sound as he hugged the notebook to his chest.

Blushing a little when he saw the Man of Steel not heading out after signing his book Geoffrey came up with an idea which would look good for his collection. "Would you mind taking a photo with me as well?"

Clark shifted his head to the side to see if he could detect any crime but it still seemed to be a quite night so he agreed to the photo. He had thought the kid wanted to have him flex his powerful alien muscles with the kid standing in front of him, or dangling from an arm. He had not expected the kid to have them take a picture as they pretended to have an "arm wrestling match."

Geoffrey was giddy as he took Superman's large hand in his to take the selfie of him trying to "beat" the hero in the contest. But as his finger went to hit the photo button he accidently hit the button to shoot a video. As he tried to correct it he absentmindedly shifted his other hand, and was so focused on his phone he did not even think anything off it until he heard the sound of flesh hitting the table the photo op was taking place at.

Looking over Geoffrey was shocked to see he had pushed Superman's hand into the table, in effect winning the arm wrestling match and had got it on film. Licking his lips he finally hit the button to stop capture and started to play the video he had just taken. Geoffrey watched as...
111131.title: A fan's dream come true

choices: Geoffrey manhandles Superman onto the floor
Geoffrey steps onto Superman's cape preventing him from leaving
1111312.content:
Geoffrey bit his lip as he watched the video he had just accidentally taken. Seeing Superman in person, having in him his house, then being able to take a picture with him was amazing enough, but if what he thought happened actually happened...this would be the greatest day of his life.

He watched the video intently, completely forgetting he had Superman's hand still pinned beneath his own. The video started, seeing himself smiling, not realizing it wasn't a photo. Then he realized and tried to fix it, and he watched Superman in the background. Geoffrey's hand slowly began to move, unknown to himself, and Superman, as far as Geoffrey could tell, was trying to stop it.

Granted, it didn't look like Superman was putting his all into it, yet with his grimacing look, it was obvious there was an effort. Geoffrey smirked as the video ended, looking towards Superman, who had a hint of blush to his cheeks...this was going to be fun. Geoffry lifted his hand off the table, finally freeing Superman's hand, the man of steel pulling his hand back, "Well...that was uh..."

"Thanks for making it look like I was strong Superman, my friends are gonna love it. But if you don't mind, could we go again...for real this time~" Geoffrey let his words hand in the air as he put his hand up, ready to go again. While Superman didn't want to hurt Geoffrey, he had to know for certain what was going on. So he nodded his head, grabbing hold of the ten-year-olds hand, and glaring at him. "Alright, ready? And...go."

Superman immediately put his everything into moving Geoffrey's arm, he would deal with the consequences later, and yet...nothing. He grit his teeth, clenching his hand harder around Geoffrey's harder, sweat beading on his brow, yet the kid's hand didn't move. This was impossible, this kid had to have been stronger than anyone or anything Superman had come against, heavier than a star or a black hole...this was impossible.

"Oh, are you trying? Sorry, I didn't realize you started yet~" Geoffrey couldn't help but taunt the man of steel, he was loving this. He slowly, purposefully slowly, moving his hand down against Superman's hand, pushing him towards the table. Superman was struggling, he truly was using all his might, yet he couldn't even make Geoffry's hand move an inch. And just like that, Superman's hand touched the table again, and Geoffry gave a toothy grin, "I win!"

He lifted his hand up, and Superman pulled his hand away in turn, clutching at his wrist...impossible. Superman was blushing, humiliated that a random child was so impossibly strong, he had to leave. "Well...uh, congratulations kid. I have to go now. there's uh...crim happening." He was lying of course, but he didn't want to be here. He stood up, turning tail and heading for the window. Geoffrey smirked, he wasn't done yet, he stood up, and before Superman could escape...
1111312.title: looked like he was trying to stop Geoffrey from...

choices: watches him struggle some more as he secretly films it
lifts his foot sending Superman stumbling
uses his foot to pull the hero closer to him
decided to verbally humiliate Superman for how weak he looked
ignore Superman's struggles as he post both arm wrestling matchs online
11113124.content:
As Superman goes to leave Geoffrey steps onto the hero's trailing red cape. Either not noticing it or not thinking anything can come of it Superman jumps to the open window. Planning to fly away from the kid and head to the Fortress of Solitude to see if anything was wrong with him.

The most powerful Superhero on the planet makes a slight "eep" sound as his cape goes tight against his neck due to Geoffrey holing it in place under his single size four tennis shoe.

Geoffrey had to laugh as Superman basically falls to the ground after his cape stops him like a dog on a choke chain making the young boy think of the Disney movie The Incredibles and Edna Mode rule of "No Capes!"

As Superman picks himself off the bedroom floor of this ten year old powerhouse he looks around to see if any of items in the kid's room is actually some variety of kryptonite, but sees nothing even with his x-ray vision, which he also turned on the kid to make sure he was not some sort of alien or cyborg. But adding to his confusion saw the kid was just what he appeared to be a ten year old boy.

Thinking the problem lay with he Superman started to tug at his cape trying to get it free from under the kid's foot. He started out not trying to look to obvious but just like he had been unable to free his hand
from other the kid's hand during their arm wrestling bout he could not get his cape free.

"I thought you said you had to go handle some crime Mr. Superman?" Geoffrey said with a smile noticing the hero trying to get his cape free from under foot.

"Um it seems to have been taken care of," Superman lied shifting his body so that he was leaning way from the kid and putting more strength into freeing his trapped cape. Geoffrey...
11113124.title: "No Capes!"

choices: on of his rouge's gallery or their henchmen
1112.content:
Bruce Wayne, aka the hero Batman, lived his life in the extremes Millionaire Playboy and business mogul by day and one of the top tier Heroes of the Justice League by night, or by crimes appearance. As one of the most intelligent heroes in the League, despite having nor superpowers, he was was always called onto dealing with large major threats to the planet.

He also matched wits with some of the most dangerous Rouges on the planet. (Don't believe me check out the events that lead up tp the comic event of the Injustice) But he was also well known for training others with his side kicks eventually becoming well known heroes in their own right such as Nightwing.

Yet despite all his hard work Gotham was still a grimy crime filled city where even normal people had to fight just to survived it.

Who manages to put Batman in his place?
1112.title: Batman

112.content: Which Marvel Hero is put into a role reversal situation.

1123.content: As I mention Ant-man in the description what about either him or Iron Man as another Marvel Hero to be put into role reversal?
1123.title: some other Marvel Hero

choices: grew to only a foot or so tall
is stuck at his current size
11231.content:
(Just a note I will be using Scott Lang version of Ant-Man since due to the movies he is the most recognizable person who held the title.)

Scott Lang having helped save the Universe from the threat of Thanos in his great wisdom had decided to mess around with his suit. After all he had already found out a way to become both Ant-Man and Giant-Man who knew what other sizes he could achieve.

Pressing buttons at random he sets off the Pym Particles but rather than become a giant or the size of an ant he shifts sizes until he is just about three to five inches tall. Nodding to himself for his new size which would make it easier to spy on the bad guy's misdeeds, especially if they had kids. His pride at his latest size was short lived as he pressed the switch to grow back the suit malfunctioned again as....
11231.title: Antman

112331.content:
In the “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse” universe, after the events of the movie
_____________________________________

The young teen has unlocked the full potential of his powers and is turning out to be a very promising hero for the citizens of New York. Having taken school seriously again, becoming one of the top minds of his class at his academy, combined with his heroic capabilities, Miles is beginning to feel like there’s nothing that can contain him. Getting a little full of himself, perhaps he should be humbled.


But by who?
112331.title: Miles Morales

choices: Confront Miles when returns to the dorm
Wait for Miles to be almost or completely naked before doing something
1123311.content:
Ganke was the best friend of Miles and was the only one who knew about his spidey secret. He’s kept that very secret safe for a long long time. And throughout their time together they have gotten very comfortable around each other, more so Miles than Ganke. Miles is often in nothing but his underwear while in the dorm, and sometimes even naked. Ganke is always pleased to see this but he keeps it a secret.

This doesn’t entirely satisfy Ganke, however. He’s always felt more towards Miles, a feeling of wanting to be more than just his friend. Granted he’s thankful for being trusted enough to be Miles’ companion, it’s just he loves Miles and wants to have a future with him, especially after schooling.

Although recently, Miles has been acting different. He started doing really good in school not too long ago, but his heroic gift has been giving him a big head and causing him to act like he’s the shit while no one else is. This makes him believe he doesn’t need to do well in school anymore, resulting in a drop in grades. This makes Ganke even more mad since they are partners with each other in many classes.

He figured that he was going to find a way to humble Miles, not just for Ganke’s sake, but for Miles too. But how?
1123311.title: His school roommate (Ganke)

choices: Dragon Ball (original, Z, Super or GT)
12.content: Which Anime is the Hero from that finds themselves in a role reversal?
12.title: Anime

13.content: Which game does the Hero come from? Also note as Video games have a clear Hero in the player character, well a part from fighting games, when you choose a game the player character is the main option for the Hero to get put in the situation.
13.title: Video Games

131.content: As there are a lot of Final Fantasy games out there lets start with the most popular one as well as my personal favorite one.
131.title: Final Fantasy Choice #1

1312.content:
Final Fantasy VIII an epic struggle between a group of the young mercenary force of SEED to stop a Time Traveling Sorcerer from the future from creating a world where time is frozen so she can live forever. The main hero is one Squall Leonhart an introverted loner whose mother had been killed when he was younger and his father was away leaving him and his older sister to be sent to an orphanage. When no one adopted him he was sent to the Garden where he trained to become a Member of SEED an elite mercenary force. No stranger to hardship he decided to train on using a Gunblade a type of weapon very few take the time to master. After passing his SEED exams and being sent on his first assignment a new Sorcerer appear in their world leading him to lead a ragtag team of other SEED members to save the world.

At one point being given the position of the leader of the entire SEED forces, despite just become a member, he has thought countless battles and somehow gained some pretty good friends. Now the only question is who puts Squall into a gay role reversal situation?
1312.title: Final Fantasy VIII a little back story

13121.content:
Now the party that Squall travels with are three females, so of course we are skipping over them. And two main male party members.

The first is Zell Dincht, who had also been at the orphanage with Squall in their youth but was adopted. Growing up in a loving home with his mother and Grandfather, Zell changed from a crybaby that he had been teased as at the orphanage into a fist specialist or a monk class of fighter. While Squall is an introvert Zell is an extrovert which somehow helps draw the leader out of his shell. Slightly hyperactive with slicked back blonde hair he wears his emotions on his sleeve and has a large heart. Zell is also the shortest member of the main party only becoming taller than one of the females in the remasted version of the game.

In one part of the game if you switch up the party in a certain way leaving one member behind, but keeping Zell with you he and Squall go on a quick walk around your base for a bit.

The second male party member is Irvine Kinneas, who once again was in the same orphanage with the other members of their party in their youth. The self proclaimed "best shooter in his Garden" in both guns and the Ladies hearts he is a bit of a playboy though he tends to buckle under pressure such as when the party is sent to assassinate the new Sorceress before she take control, leading into the final boss battle of disk one. While not as energetic as Zell, Irvine has his own type of flair as he tends to dress like a cowboy with a long brown trench coat and a black cowboy hat. He is also a bit of a pervert as during one mission as a way to mark a location where Squall is to talk to a female member of the party the sign he leaves is an old porno magazine.

While there is only two main male party members this does not mean there is no other choices as in game, since it is a Final Fantasy game, there are summoning called Guardian Forces, or GF which can also be chosen to place Squall into a role reversal. This does sort of constitute a form of Bestiality since most of them do not have human forms. With the exceptions of Shiva and Siren but as they are also female they will not be a choice to be picked.

So the question is which of Squalls teammates does he find himself submitting to?
13121.title: A member of his party

choices: physical activity such as arm wrestling or squat contest
131211.content:
During the siege of Zell's hometown of Balamb with the enemy forces occupying the towns hotel Zell gave in letting Squall and their third member of their team, Selphie, to stay in his childhood bed room. Though the room plan was quite open most of the space was taken up by Zell's exercise equipment with only a king sized bed pushed to the corner of the room.

Since it was also Zell's mothers house she utterly refused to let Selphie share the room with the boys for the night having her bunk downstairs with her. Squall looked at the unmade bed and than at the floor that was littered with either exercise items or trash from both energy bars and drinks. "So who gets the bed?" he asked.

"It is my house and room I get the bed you can use the floor," Zell said with the slight cocky grin of his as he lifted his hands above his head to work out his joints.

"There is no way I am sleeping on all this trash," Squall said kicking some trash with his foot.

"This is my house and room I may have had no choice to let you use my room due to the Galbadia bastards taking over the towns hotel but you are not taking my bed. If you don't like the trash you clean it up," Zell said sitting down right on his bed and watching what the normally silent team leader would do.

Zell almost rolled his eyes as Squall was silent for a moment "brooding" before he stated, "Let's have a contest to see who gets the bed then."

"What type of contest?" Zell asked knowing that despite his smaller form could easily overpower Squall in most physical contest, but if Squall chose to have a game of Triple Triad he was in for a challenge. From what he heard from one of his friends in the library Squall had only started to play the game shorting before their SEED exam but was now the top ranked player in the Garden. Squall chose to face Zell off for the bed through.....
131211.title: The bed for the night starts it all off

choices: massage his feet (for a low level GF card)
organize Zell's work out equipment and magazines
1312112.content:
Zell inwardly groaned as Squall choose a single mate of Triple Triad to determine who could sleep in the bed that night. Sure Zell had a deck but it was not that powerful with only the Whip fighter and Monk in his hand while Squall was rumored to have a deck full of GF and fighter cards at his disposal.

"Alright what type of game are we playing?" Zell asked knowing that the games rules changed by location.

"Open hands but the winner gets all the other's cards, as well as the bed for the night. In the slight chance we have a draw we are to use the same cards each game until one of us wins," Squall said with an actual smile on his face shocking Zell a little.

"Okay lets just get this over with," Zell said pulling out his hand hoping for some sort of miracle to win this. To both his surprise and annoyance Squall did not seem to be taking the game that seriously as rather than his GF deck the highest card Squall had in his hand was a Monk card, and not just any Monk card but his mother's card who had modeled it after him. Seeing his mother's beloved card, which she had spent a months pay to modify into his likeness filled Zell with an overriding desire to win the game at al cost.

The game was pretty intense with the pair actually having a draw three times in a row. In the last game it came down to the barest margins as the last card Squall placed down was Zell's mother's card leaving only on spot to the right of the monk card. Zell almost gave a cheer as he placed down his last card, a Red Giant, as the seven total on the card's right side beat the five on the modded Monk card.

Zell could not stop smiling as he pumped his right arm in victory before holding out his hand for Squalls cards. Squall let out a groan as he pass over all the cards he had used in the game and made as if to start cleaning up a bit of floor to sleep on when Zell stopped him. "What are you doing you said the winner gets all the other's cards not just the ones we had used in the game?" Zell asked and saw Squall's face fall at the thought of losing his OP deck.

"Oh come one Zell you know what a I meant," Squall said.

"Ah but what you meant is not what you said and I agreed on now hand them over," Zell said still holding his hand out.

"Can't we work something out with no cards I would lose my position as Full Ace," Squall said surprising Zell when the blonde heard bit of a whine in his friends normally stoic and measured voice.

"I guess we could," Zell said rubbing the back of his neck.

"Oh thank you Zell thank you I will make sure to have the kitchens save hotdogs for you every day," Squall said once more shocking Zell for the brunette knowing his favorite, if rare food chose which always seemed to sell out just before he made it to lunch.

"That is nice Squall but I am still wanting the cards until you pay me back," Zell said holding out his hand for the other's deck. With a sign of resignation Squall finally turned over all his cards before going back to cleaning a spot for him to sleep. Zell quickly set aside his mother's card to give back to her before going through the rest of Squall's deck.

Zell started to separate the won cards into several piles of low ranked cards he would hand over right away, some higher monster cards he would keep for himself and finally the GF and fighter cards which he would hand back after Squall had earned them. Seeing Squall had finished cleaning off a spot on the floor to sleep Zell called out, "If you clean the whole room I shall give you some cards back." Squall jumped a little and began to collect the trash on the floor putting it into a garbage bag and even sweep and dusted everything afterwards. Seeing his room now spotless, well as spotless as it could be with two people still inside of it, Zell gathered the handful of low ranked cards and passed them over to the other male.

Gaining them Squall smiled as he began to put them into order and slip them back into his deck pouch on his hip with a small, "Thank you."

"Don't mention it but if you want another card I have another job for you," Zell said swinging his legs over the edge of the bed and onto the floor.

"What do I have to do?" Squall asked. Zell just smiled up at him and told the other boy to....
1312112.title: a game of Triple Triad

choices: one of the other Fallout games or expansion packs
134.content:
After a Nuclear War the land many people survived by heading into fallout shelters know as Vaults. While on the world's surface it was a hell scape full of mutated animals, humans, and later non-mutated humans that were forced to leave behind may morals just to survive. Not many humans who entered the waste could be considered "Heroes" for even the Brotherhood of Steel would focus on their own goals rather than help the people. The only accretion was a group that had broken itself off from the main forces of the Brotherhood when they set up shop in the ruins of DC. This group actually tried to protect the people and even work on cleaning up the water in the area.

Now the heroes from this series are mostly Vault Dwellers who after living in vaults were not used to the world outside. One dweller having been kicked out/running for their lives after their father escapes the vault, where no one was ever meant to leave. While the other dweller had been in cryostasis since the nuclear bombs had dropped. Having to survive in places so unlike what they are used to it is no surprise that the two male heroes from the vaults find themselves getting placed into situations they might not be able to handle.

Which game shall we focus on?
134.title: Fallout

14.content: In which book is the hero from?
14.title: Books

choices: he comes across Hermione's cat, Crookshanks
he is hit by a spell which changes him back into a human
141.content:
(As Harry is the Hero of the Harry Potter series I will be focus on him if you want another protagonist from the series you can start it in other.)

Harry was feeling rather proud of himself for after nearly two years he had finally masters his Animagus form. He was sure if he had not had to worry about the blasted tournament last year he could have done it in one, but still to achieve the form at his age. Which was according to Sirius was the same age his dad had been when he was able to change into Prongs was something. He was also proud of the fact that he had been able to do it without any help from either Hermione, or anyone else.

Unlike his Dad or Godfather, Harry's form was a small black house cat thinking he would be less noticeable than a stag or a Grimform wandering around the castle. And he would possibly be mistaken for a student's pet.

Depending on Hogwarts itself he might be able to, as a cat, sneak into the other dorm rooms to see if any one had an issue with him this year like the other years.

Having shifted into his cat form Harry was currently out passed curfew exploring the castle to see if the Marauders had missed any secret passages, or any had been formed since their time . He is wandering down a little used passageway near the Hospital wing when....
141.title: Harry Potter

15.content: Which Movie or TV show is the hero from that ends up in the role reversal?
15.title: Movies/TV shows

choices: The Prequels- Hero Obi-wan (ep I) Anakin(Ep 2-3)
Star Wars Rebels- Kanan or Ezra
151.content: With a large time frame there are plenty of Heroes t choose from so which time frame are you looking for?
151.title: Star Wars

choices: In case you want it Episode 1 Hero Anakin Skywalker
Anakin Skywalker in the Clone Wars animated TV series
1511.content:
During the Prequel movies there are two possible heroes to chose from. During episode one despite saving the day Anakin is a little to young to be the main hero so the option will be mainly Obi-Wan to place into a role reversal.

Being older in episode two and three plus having a bigger reputation as a hero than he had in the first firl Anakin is the obvious choice to end up as the one who is fond to be in a role reversal. Also as the animated TV show Star War Clone Wars also takes place in during this time that option is added as well.
1511.title: The Prequels- Hero Obi-wan (ep I) Anakin(Ep 2-3)

choices: a Jedi Youngling who got tired of his special treatment
a Senatorial aid who disliked the attitude Anakin showed to their boss
Dexter Jester or a patron at his his dinner
Jar Jar Binks to remind the arrogent Jedi where he came from
15112.content:
Anakin Skywalker reputation was already growing both inside and outside the Jedi Order giving him a slightly big head and high opinion of himself. Something that someone want to get rid of as he they make plans to teach him that just cause he was freed and taken away from his live of slavery did not mean he did not have some of those old learned behaviors still in him.

Who makes move or reminding Anakin his place in the Universe?
15112.title: Episode 2- Hero Anakin Skywalker

info.brief_description: Heroes from various fandoms find them themselves in role reversal situations (Gay)
info.description:
The story of a Hero who goes from top dog to losing to someone they would normally lose to such as a sidekick, a villain, henchmen or even just your run of the mill civilian.

I will allow most fetishes and fandoms.

The only rules are keep it M/M there can be females but not part of the role reversal.
No gore/killing the hero can be badly hurt but please do not go into detail on blood and guts.
No Scat (Seriously if a chapter contains it I will delete it with no hesitation)
Minimal farting but only close to a person not right in their face. For example say the story's hero is Antman who get stuck at a small size, and is found by a little boy. The young boy puts can put Antman in down his pants the boy can fart and make Antman pass out but the hero can only be in the front of the pants during such an event.
Pissing on the hero is allowed but only go into great detail about marking not having them drink it.

After the selection chapter please make the chapter at least three sentences long
Please also leave at least two choices at the end of the chapter even if the second choice is "other."
That is all enjoy.
